text: Hi I'm Miles, a young collegiate student from the United States (Georgia). I get a lot of joy out of trying new languages, tools, and ideas, and promoting them through my projects. That being said, my main language is Rust. Actually a political science student, but get a lot of joy being introduced to new people through the computing community -- and find a lot of similarities between the two fields (at their best). Just a bunch of people trying to solve the world's problems. If anyone is looking to share something, I will always be looking to listen.
